Name: corporations
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

Corporations care about the bottom line, which has advantages and disadvantages for mercenaries.  On the one hand, corporate executives recognize mercenaries as fellow independent businessmen and generally treat them with a degree of professional courtesy. On the other hand, they carefully weigh costs and benefits in every negotiation.
ReputationStatements: Several competitors have developed unrealistic expectations regarding market share.

MissionSuccessStatements: Precisely the result we paid for. I imagine our competitors are having a very unpleasant day.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Not the result we wanted, though the data gathered may prove valuable.
BadFaithFailureStatements: You didn't just fail the contract. You failed publicly. Do you have any idea what that does to investor confidence?
